sections.paragraph:
m. with suff. בִּלְעִי-

(1) a devouring, something devoured, Jer 51:44.

(2) destruction, Psa 52:6.

(3) [Bela], pr.n. of a city on the southern shore of the Dead Sea, called also צֹעַר (little), Gen 14:2, Gen 14:8 19:20 , seq.

(4) pr.n. m.-(a) of a king of the Edomites, Gen 36:32.-(b) Gen 46:21.-(c) 1Ch 5:8.
